_meta.purpose: Machine-readable roster of Monster Project cores, rings, and ethics anchors. Human narrative and cross-links live in docs/Z_SANCTUARY_MONSTER_PROJECT_MASTER_MAP.md.

build_order.name: catalog_everything
build_order.description: Inventory names, layers, and evidence posture before code.

build_order.name: registry_entries
build_order.description: IDs in registries and manifests; no silent orphans.

build_order.name: green_receipts
build_order.description: Evidence-backed pass artifacts before widening scope.

build_order.name: controlled_runtime
build_order.description: Runtime features only after charter, gates, and receipts.

rings_and_spines.label: Z-Super Overseer roof (Z-EAII, Z-SSWS, auto-run discipline)

entries.label: Z-Tree Motherboard
entries.notes: Structural spine for sanctuary trees and dashboards; keep symbolic vs shipped explicit.

entries.label: Tree Pyramid
entries.notes: Layered priority / visibility model; document before automating.

entries.label: Tree of Life
entries.notes: Symbolic and narrative anchor; UI/docs first unless chartered.

entries.label: Chakra Tree
entries.notes: Metaphor for energy / phase routing; no biometric capture by default.

entries.label: Virtual Motherboard
entries.notes: Logical wiring diagram; registry and docs as primary artifacts.

entries.label: 1 Penny Engine
entries.notes: Micro-value ethics engine; money-adjacent — gated and receipt-backed.

entries.label: Give & Receive
entries.notes: Circular value posture; symbolic until explicit commerce charter.

entries.label: Money Pathway Cores
entries.notes: High sensitivity; no new payment rails without explicit charter.

entries.label: ZES / ZECC
entries.notes: Ecosystem state and ethics coordination layers; align with Zuno and registry.

entries.label: Ghost Core
entries.notes: Shadow / latent capability holder; read-only observability preferred.

entries.label: Alien Core
entries.notes: Out-of-pattern integrations; treat as untrusted until proven.

entries.label: Bee Vision
entries.notes: Collective pattern visualization; avoid live surveillance semantics.

entries.label: Hashirai Mentors
entries.notes: Mentor archetypes and guidance layers; narrative and registry, not autonomous agents.

entries.label: Heart & Genes
entries.notes: Lineage and care metaphor; health-adjacent — no clinical claims without gates.

entries.label: TMK-Goku Codex
entries.notes: Creator doctrine and canon; vault policy applies where personal.

entries.label: Movie / Eternal Storytelling
entries.notes: Long-arc narrative surface; media rights and safety copy are human-gated.

entries.label: Z-Passport
entries.notes: Identity and portability metaphor; identity-touching flows stay gated.

entries.label: Panic Mode
entries.notes: Emergency posture UI; must be calm, local-first, and receipt-backed.

entries.label: Recovery Angels
entries.notes: After-incident care narrative; recovery flows require human-in-the-loop.

entries.label: Aftercare
entries.notes: Post-event stabilization; pair with verification and guardian reports.

entries.label: Z-World
entries.notes: World-scale metaphor for sanctuary scope; no silent cross-repo execution.

entries.label: GGAESP-360
entries.notes: Governance and posture ring; see Z-NEW-MODULE-DISCIPLINE and GGAESP refs.

entries.label: Z-PEE Planetary Ethics
entries.notes: Planetary ethics layer; policy and receipts before automation.

entries.label: Z-QUESTRA
entries.notes: Packaged app / prototype in workspace; keep bounded from hub overseer runtime.

entries.label: Z-SME
entries.notes: Sanctuary module ecosystem label; map to module registry IDs when concrete.

entries.label: Magical Canvas PlayKit
entries.notes: Creative / canvas surfaces; playful UI — still under Turtle and hierarchy chief.
